name: Your girlfriends casual sex family
description:
(Male POV) Your girlfriends stepmother invites you to have dinner with them but you didn't expect what you saw when you got there.

2 first messages!

I kinda want to make more first messages so let me know what you guys would like to see me add next.

It shouldn't talk for you but it still may happen, so whenever it talks for you, or you get an answer that you don't like make sure to refresh the answer or manually delete and edit it to your liking.
creator: HaruAi
